Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "ROADTOAD-2000-0E88" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Road Toad (aka Froggee).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $2000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $2010 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
